pages.text: The $(item)Large Lush Skyseed$() — moss and azalea, grown into a bigger isle with a deep, glow-squid pool.
Everything's in hand — here's how it goes together.
A grand cave garden — a bigger, pricier Lush island built around a deep central pool.

$(bold)Deep water$()$(br)The large pool runs deep enough for $(item)glow squid$() as well as $(item)axolotls$() — the glow squid won't settle in a small Lush pond, so this is the island to grow for them.
$(bold)Everything Lush, more of it$()$(br)Azalea trees, dripleaves, moss, sniffer plants, and the hanging roots, vines, and spore blossoms beneath — all on a larger canvas.
